# Tyerman's Automotive & Suspension

> Family-owned auto repair shop in Burbank, CA, specializing in wheel alignment, suspension, and brake service.

Tyerman's Automotive & Suspension is a 13-bay shop on Magnolia Blvd in Burbank, CA offering wheel alignment, suspension and steering repair, brakes, engine diagnostics, tires, and cooling/heating service.

## Pages

- [Home](https://tyermans.com/): Overview of the shop and core services.
- [Services](https://tyermans.com/services): Full list of automotive services offered.
- [Portfolio](https://tyermans.com/portfolio): Photos of past customer vehicles and work.
- [About](https://tyermans.com/about): Shop history and team background.
- [Contact](https://tyermans.com/contact): Location, hours, and contact details.
- [Request Appointment](https://tyermans.com/appointment): Schedule a service appointment.
